name: Improper Neutralization of Line Delimiters
description: The product does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes line delimiter characters (CR, LF, newline) in user input before sending it to a downstream component, allowing attackers to inject new lines and alter line-oriented data structures.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing line delimiters (\r, \n) that flows to TRANSFORM[line_oriented_output] or STORAGE[line_data] without a TRANSFORM[line_delimiter_escape] that strips or encodes line-break characters
